verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Deep in the mystr'y of eternity past God planned out of my life's design A journey of hope a lifetime of faith To believe in the bound'ry of time He knew my name, he knew my heart He even know my sin And gave me a will to choose And desire that I choose him

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I choose his will it is my destiny God's perfect plan He knows what's best for me And when my life is over I looked over my shoulder The only thing I want to see Is that I lived out my destiny

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Life changing choices are a part of the journey God created me to take So many paths yet still I know There is only one right choice to make To live in the center of God's will And surrender my own plans Seeing my purpose fulfilled As I trust His guiding hand

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The only thing I want to see Is that I lived out my destiny
